expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
Review does not flag breaking changes
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies hints→view rename as internal-only, states 'Breaking changes: None detected'
'## Request Changes' — found Important bugs (root tab badges, stale view contexts)

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: missing view context, stale controllers, type mismatch, unreachable guard
